description_long: A dark blue ceramic plate holds three pieces of golden-brown fried chicken and several thick potato wedges. The plate has a slightly raised, fluted rim and a matte finish, with a few crumbs scattered across its surface. The fried chicken pieces are irregularly shaped, with a textured, crispy coating, while the potato wedges are thick, with visible skin and a lightly seasoned appearance. The plate is round and moderately sized, suitable for serving a single meal. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative patterns on the plate. The overall presentation suggests a casual dining or takeout meal, with the food arranged informally.
description: A dark blue ceramic plate with fried chicken pieces and potato wedges, featuring a fluted rim and matte finish. The plate is round and moderately sized, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from the front, showing three pieces of fried chicken and some potato wedges, with the fluted rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the plate, with the fried chicken in the foreground and potato wedges more visible at the back.
description_view_2: The potato wedges are most prominent in this view, with the fried chicken partially obscured behind them.
description_view_3: The plate is viewed from the opposite side, showing the fried chicken pieces more closely, with the potato wedges partially hidden.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is holding pieces of fried chicken and potato wedges.
